steps.title: Identify the linear model
steps.content: The graph shows total charge C versus hours x. Since the electrician charges a onetime fee plus an hourly rate, the relationship is linear: C = (hourly rate)·x + (onetime fee). The slope m = ΔC/Δx represents the change in charge per change in hours, i.e., dollars per hour.

steps.title: Interpret the slope
steps.content: The slope tells us how much the total charge increases for each additional hour of work. That is exactly the electrician’s hourly rate. That matches choice A — A is correct.
